hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Today brings opportunities for growth. Embrace challenges as they come.
aries.love: Passion ignites today; connect deeply with your partner.
aries.career: Collaboration is key at work; approach team projects with enthusiasm.

taurus.general: Stability is your focus today. Make choices that bring peace of mind.
taurus.love: Be open to expressing your feelings; honesty deepens connections.
taurus.career: A steady approach will yield positive results; do not rush.

gemini.general: Communication is vital today; share your thoughts openly.
gemini.love: Flirtation is in the air; let your playful side shine!
gemini.career: Networking can lead to new opportunities; reach out to others.

cancer.general: Intuition guides you today; trust your instincts in key decisions.
cancer.love: Emotional depth strengthens relationships; be vulnerable.
cancer.career: Focus on details; your meticulous nature will be appreciated.

leo.general: Today shines bright; let your creativity flow.
leo.love: Romance is heightened; surprise your partner with a gesture of love.
leo.career: Take the lead in projects; your confidence inspires others.

virgo.general: Clarity comes in focus; refine your plans and goals.
virgo.love: Practicality in love brings stability; work together towards common goals.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will serve you well; trust your judgment.

libra.general: Balance is crucial today; seek harmony in your surroundings.
libra.love: Compromise leads to understanding; communicate with care.
libra.career: Collaborative projects will thrive; value others' input.

scorpio.general: Intensity surrounds you; embrace deep emotions and insights.
scorpio.love: Passion reignites in relationships; explore new depths.
scorpio.career: Your determination can drive projects forward; stay focused.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; seek new experiences that broaden your horizons.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity keeps relationships exciting; plan a surprise date.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas can spark change; share them confidently.

capricorn.general: Today is about discipline and focus; stick to your goals.
capricorn.love: Loyalty is a priority; show your partner how much they mean to you.
capricorn.career: Hard work will be rewarded; persistence pays off.

aquarius.general: Originality thrives today; express your unique ideas.
aquarius.love: Friendship deepens into romance; nurture your connections.
aquarius.career: Teamwork can lead to innovation; embrace collaborative efforts.

pisces.general: Creativity and intuition guide your path today; flow with it.
pisces.love: Embrace emotional openness; it fosters deeper bonds.
pisces.career: Your imagination can spark breakthrough ideas; don't hesitate to share.

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
professional.author: John D. Rockefeller

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
professional.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
motivation.author: Walt Disney

motivation.text: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

captions.text: Life is a journey, enjoy the ride!
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay humble.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day may not be good, but there is something good in every day.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and you will be unstoppable.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: If you think technology can solve your problems, you don’t understand technology and you don’t understand your problems.
tech.author: Bruce Schneier

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Edward Abbey

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Life is short, smile while you still have teeth!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on the patch to success. I can't stop smiling.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I followed my heart and it led me to the fridge.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: You can't put a limit on anything. The more you dream, the further you get.
fun.author: Michael Phelps

fun.text: Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out of it alive.
fun.author: Elbert Hubbard

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith is not the absence of doubt; it is the means through which faith can grow.
faith.author: Tanya Markul

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is always hope.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Everything is in the hands of God if we give it back to Him.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
